title: THE TWIDDLERS 4 Pack Christmas Mugs in Gift Box, 340ml Fine Porcelain Hot Chocolate Cups, Assorted Santa, Penguin & Reindeer Designs, Festive Tableware for Secret Santa & Christmas Eve Boxes
features: COMPLETE FESTIVE COLLECTION: Elevate your holiday breakfast or tea break with this set of 4 matching mugs. Featuring charming Santa, penguin, polar bear, and reindeer designs, they add an instant touch of Christmas spirit to any kitchen, office desk, or dining table.

READY-TO-GIFT PACKAGING: Struggling with awkward wrapping? These mugs arrive in a beautifully designed, decorative gift box. They make an effortless, high-impact present for teachers, colleagues, or friends, and are ideal for splitting up into individual stocking fillers or Secret Santa gifts.

PERFECT FOR HOT CHOCOLATE STATIONS: With a 340ml capacity, these cups are the ideal size for a generous serving of hot cocoa with marshmallows, mulled wine, or a large festive coffee. They serve as essential tableware for movie nights and family gatherings during the holiday season.

DURABLE & DISHWASHER SAFE: Crafted from high-quality, solid porcelain, these mugs are built to withstand daily use. They are fully dishwasher safe and easy to clean, ensuring the vibrant festive colours stay bright year after year without fading.
PEACE OF MIND: We are confident you will love your festive mug set. If you have any issues with your order, please contact us directly so we can resolve them to ensure your complete satisfaction.
description: Product Description A collection of Christmassy homeware items bound to make you smile!
